creator: vendion@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Roman Bogorodskiy from comment #3)

Yes thet is what I was talking about, I was thinking maybe "www" would be the correct category for it. I just posted to the ports mailing list to confirm this as that would probably be a better place to discuse this than here.

As for the fact that there were no build instructions provided upstream, yeah I see that they added that recently. Before that I was going to try and do something similar to the Arch Linux package for it:

> maturin build --release --strip
> cargo build --release --locked --all-features --target-dir=target

Although the upstream's new doc implys the implict `cargo` call is not needed.
